full_text:
Lü Fan (Ziheng) 呂範 (子衡)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lü Fan (呂範), styledZiheng (子衡), was born in Xiyang in Runan. Was an aide to Yuan Shu, but left for Sun Ce. Suggested Lady Sun’s marriage. Lü Fan was affiliated with Yuan Shu and the Wu Kingdom. Lü Fan lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
